properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 98/16
SEISMIC SURVEY 20 SEPTEMBER TO 02 NOVEMBER
BY R/V BGP PROSPECTOR TOWING 10
8000 METER LONG CABLES IN AREA BOUND BY

A. 72-46.19N 015-22.24E
B. 72-20.52N 019-14.45E
C. 71-19.40N 019-13.68E
D. 71-46.22N 015-24.24E

REQUESTING A WIDE BERTH, 3 NM AHEAD, PORT AND STARBOARD SIDE AND 6 NM ASTERN.
SUPPORT VESSEL GEO SERVICE 1. WORKING CHANNAL VHF 69 AND STANDBY 16.
